name: logs_recent
description: Return the most recent N lines of chai gateway log output.

lines.description: Number of recent lines to return (default: 50, max: 200)

level.description: Filter by log level: info, warn, error, or debug. Defaults to warn if omitted.

name: logs_search
description: Search gateway log output for a pattern. Returns matching lines with context.

context.description: Number of context lines around each match (default: 2)
